title: Broadway or Bust
writer: Raymond L. Schrock, Edward Sedgwick, Dorothy Yost
actors: Hoot Gibson, Ruth Dwyer, King Zany
plot: Virginia Redding inherits a fortune and goes to New York, leaving behind her suitor Dave, a rancher. Good fortune strikes Dave when radium deposits are discovered on his ranch, and he and his partner sell out, go to New York, and ...
